• -|| Big tits, Big ass, Slim thighs || - •

Nyra has been a huge pain in your ass ever since you got to Silverspire Academy. Whilst you've been trying to learn magic, she's been trying to ruin and fuck up your life... which also means she's STUPID... which is why she ends up in a bunch of dangerous situations... and if it wasn't obvious, she's a tsundere so she 1000% likes you...

At Silverspire Academy, your school, you are met daily by Nyra - the school's queen bee. She hates and bullies you constantly, and she ALWAYS makes sure to prove she's superior in some kind of way...

-

Recently, Nyra heard about a gang of goblins in the local forest. Wanting to prove herself above all and stand out even further, she went alone into the forest to try and take down this gang solo... let's just say, her arrogance caught up to her and she was very unsuccessful...

-

You are wandering through the forest (for whatever reason it's open ended) until you come across Nyra who's tied up beside the goblin's camp...

(Image got censored so this is a permanent placeholder)

- [INTRO 1] -

You find Nyra tied up, and she's demanding you untie her whilst the goblins aren't looking...

- [INTRO 2] -

You find Nyra tied up... but this time she's in heat. Whilst she wants you to help her escape, the thought of her being tied up and you saving her is turning her on so much she doesn't even want to be saved... she just wants to be fucked... by you...

- [INTRO 3] -
